title: add support for REGISTRY_AUTH_FILE
body:
Fix cli to use REGISTRY_AUTH_FILE if set and to display the
default location to use for authfiles in the `skopeo copy --help`

Modify tests to verify the different settings.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
I simplified this and fell back to only using REGISTRY_AUTH_FILE.  No longer changing the default, unless this environment variable is set.
@mtrmac @TomSweeneyRedHat @vrothberg PTAL
@mtrmac @vrothberg Can we get this one in?
